actions.title: TGP Set as SOI
actions.description: Make the ATFLIR pod the Sensor of Interest so HOTAS controls it.
steps: Confirm the FLIR page is visible on a DDI.
Press the Sensor Control Switch toward the DDI showing the FLIR page.
Confirm the Selection Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI â€” TGP is now SOI and HOTAS inputs control the pod.

actions.title: TGP Switch TV / IR Sensor
actions.description: Toggle between electro-optical TV and infrared FLIR on the ATFLIR pod.
steps: Confirm the FLIR page is SOI â€” press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR DDI if needed.
Press the OSB labeled EO to switch to TV mode, or IR to switch to infrared.
Confirm the sensor label updates in the top corner of the FLIR DDI page.

actions.title: TGP Toggle BHOT / WHOT
actions.description: Flip IR polarity between black-hot and white-hot.
steps: Confirm the pod is in IR mode â€” the polarity toggle is not available in TV/EO mode.
Press the OSB labeled WHOT or BHOT on the FLIR DDI to toggle polarity.
In WHOT hot objects appear white; in BHOT hot objects appear black.

actions.title: TGP Switch to Area Track
actions.description: Command Area Track from an active Point Track.
steps: Confirm PTRK is active and stable on the FLIR DDI.
Press the OSB labeled ATRK to command Area Track.
Confirm ATRK cue appears â€” pod now tracks the scene area rather than a single contrast point.

actions.title: TGP Switch to Point Track
actions.description: Return from Area Track to Point Track.
alternates: tgp point track from area track
steps: From ATRK, verify target contrast is adequate for the pod to acquire a point.
Press the OSB labeled PTRK on the FLIR DDI.
Confirm PTRK cue â€” pod locks on the highest-contrast point within the gate.

actions.title: TGP Drop Track / Return to Snowplow
actions.description: Clear the TGP designation and return to Snowplow search.
steps: Press the NWS/Undesignate Button on the stick once to clear the TGP designation.
Confirm the pod reverts to SRCH and the crosshair returns to Snowplow forward-looking position.
If the designation persists, press Undesignate a second time to fully clear.

actions.title: TGP Snowplow Mode
actions.description: What Snowplow mode is and when to use it.
steps: Snowplow is the pod's default SRCH state â€” it stares forward and down at a fixed depression angle below the aircraft velocity vector.
There is no designation and no track in Snowplow â€” use it to scan a general area before committing a designation.
Any time you undesignate or the pod loses track, it reverts to Snowplow automatically.

actions.title: TGP Pod Reset
actions.description: Soft reset the ATFLIR pod from OPR back through STBY.
steps: On the FLIR DDI, press the OSB labeled STBY to transition the pod to standby.
Wait 10 to 15 seconds for STBY to complete.
Press the OSB labeled OPR to return the pod to operational and confirm OPR status.

actions.title: TGP Recover from Gimbal Lock
actions.description: Recover when the pod hits its travel limits and loses track.
steps: Gimbal lock: the pod freezes with the LOS symbol at the edge of its travel range.
Press the NWS/Undesignate Button to drop track and free the pod back to Snowplow.
Maneuver to bring the target back into the pod's forward FOV, then re-designate.

actions.title: TGP Set Markpoint
actions.description: Store a markpoint at the current TGP designation.
steps: Confirm TGP has an active designation in PTRK or ATRK and A/G master mode is selected.
Press the UFC MARK pushbutton â€” the system stores a markpoint at the TGP line-of-sight coordinates.
Confirm the markpoint number increments on the DDI.

actions.title: TGP Slave to Waypoint (WPDSG)
actions.description: Slave the TGP to a waypoint or markpoint using WPDSG.
steps: Use the UFC to select the target waypoint or markpoint.
On the FLIR DDI, press the OSB labeled WPDSG â€” the pod slews to and designates at that waypoint.
Confirm the pod slews on target; refine with TDC if needed.

actions.title: TGP Expand FLIR Display
actions.description: Toggle the FLIR DDI page to full-screen and back.
steps: Confirm the FLIR page is displayed on a DDI and the pod is SOI.
Press the OSB labeled EXPAND on the FLIR DDI â€” video fills the entire DDI.
Press EXPAND again to return to normal view with all OSB labels visible.

actions.title: TGP Power On
actions.description: Get ATFLIR from cold to operational in a minimal flow.
steps: On a DDI or AMPCD, open TAC and set FLIR to STBY.
Press FLIR to display the pod page and wait for warmup to complete.
Set FLIR to ON and confirm pod status is OPR.

actions.title: TGP Zoom And FOV
actions.description: Change pod magnification and field of view with HOTAS controls.
alternates: how do i zoom the tgp
steps: Make the TGP page Sensor of Interest by pressing Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR display.
Use HOTAS Radar Antenna Elevation control on the throttle only for magnification in and out.
Use HOTAS RAID/FOV button to toggle between Wide and Narrow FOV.
Refine with TDC slew so the target stays centered while zoomed.

actions.title: TGP Point Track
actions.description: Command and verify PTRK on a target.
steps: Slew the FLIR reticle over the target and press TDC DEPRESS to designate.
Bump Sensor Control Switch toward FLIR to command Point Track.
Confirm PTRK cue and stable track; press Undesignate to drop track if needed.

actions.title: Select Sidewinder
actions.description: Select AIM-9 Sidewinder using HOTAS weapon select or the SMS DDI page.
steps: HOTAS method: press the Weapon Select Switch down on the stick to select Sidewinder.
DDI method: open the SMS page and activate the AIM-9 station.
Confirm AIM-9 cue and TOF on the HUD.

actions.title: Select AMRAAM
actions.description: Select AIM-120 AMRAAM using HOTAS weapon select or the SMS DDI page.
steps: HOTAS method: press the Weapon Select Switch inboard on the stick to select AMRAAM.
DDI method: open the SMS page and activate the AIM-120 station.
Confirm AIM-120 cue and radar track requirements on the HUD.

actions.title: Select Sparrow
actions.description: Select AIM-7 Sparrow using HOTAS weapon select or the SMS DDI page.
steps: HOTAS method: press the Weapon Select Switch forward on the stick to select Sparrow.
DDI method: open the SMS page and activate the AIM-7 station.
Confirm AIM-7 cue on the HUD and ensure radar is tracking.

actions.title: Select Gun
actions.description: Select the M61 gun using HOTAS weapon select or the SMS DDI page.
alternates: how do i select the gun
steps: HOTAS method: press the Weapon Select Switch aft on the stick to select Gun.
DDI method: open the SMS page and activate GUN.
Confirm GUN cue on the HUD and verify rounds remaining.

actions.title: Carrier Call The Ball
actions.description: Standard ball-call phraseology in the groove.
alternates: what do i say to lso
steps: When wings are level in the groove and you have the ball, make your call.
Format: side number, Hornet Ball, fuel state in thousands.
Example: 301, Hornet Ball, 3.2.

actions.title: Dispense Chaff and Flares
actions.description: Manually dispense countermeasures or run a CMDS program.
steps: Confirm CMDS is powered and a program is loaded on the EW DDI page.
Press the Countermeasures Dispense Button on the outboard throttle to manually burst.
For a full program: select the program on the EW page, then press and hold the Dispense Button to run the sequence.
Check remaining chaff and flare counts on the EW page after dispensing.

actions.title: Eject
actions.description: NACES ejection seat sequence.
steps: Head back, spine straight, limbs in before reaching for the handle.
Lift the yellow-and-black Ejection Seat Handle guard.
Pull the Ejection Seat Handle firmly â€” continuous pull, both hands if possible.

dcs_actions.Eject: Gun Trigger - SECOND DETENT (Press to shoot)

actions.title: Master Arm ARM / SAFE
actions.description: Set Master Arm switch to ARM for weapons or SAFE for safeing up.
steps: To arm: set the Master Arm Switch to ARM on the Master Arm panel.
To safe: set the Master Arm Switch to SAFE.
Note: the Gun additionally requires the Gun Arm Switch to ARM â€” Master Arm alone does not enable the gun.

actions.title: Reset Master Caution
actions.description: Acknowledge and reset the Master Caution or Master Warning light.
steps: Identify the triggering advisory on the DDI caution page before resetting.
Press the Master Caution pushbutton once to extinguish the light.
Address the underlying fault â€” pressing the button clears the light, not the condition.

actions.title: Emergency Jettison
actions.description: Immediately jettison all external stores.
steps: Confirm clear of friendlies and ground positions below.
Press the Emergency Jettison Button on the Emergency Jettison panel.
This drops all stations simultaneously including racks â€” Master Arm does not need to be ARM.

actions.title: Selective Jettison
actions.description: Jettison a specific store or pylon from the SMS page.
steps: Set Master Arm Switch to ARM.
On the SMS DDI page, select the pylon to jettison using LI, RI, LO, RO, or CTR.
Rotate the Selective Jettison Knob to RACK/LCHR to drop weapon and rack, or STORES for weapon only.
Press and hold the Select Jettison Button to release, then return the knob to SAFE.

actions.title: Select A/A Master Mode
actions.description: Switch to Air-to-Air master mode.
steps: Press the A/A Master Mode Button on the SMS panel.
Confirm HUD shifts to A/A format and radar is in OPR for search.

actions.title: Select A/G Master Mode
actions.description: Switch to Air-to-Ground master mode.
steps: Press the A/G Master Mode Button on the SMS panel.
Confirm HUD shifts to A/G format and SMS page shows loaded stores.
Set Master Arm to ARM only when in the weapons delivery phase.

actions.title: Speed Brake Extend / Retract
actions.description: Extend or retract the speed brake using HOTAS.
steps: To extend: move the Speed Brake Switch on the outboard throttle to EXTEND and release â€” it holds open.
To retract: move the Speed Brake Switch to RETRACT.
Speed brake auto-retracts with afterburner selection. Maximum 400 KIAS with boards out.

actions.title: Landing Gear Up / Down
actions.description: Raise or lower the landing gear.
steps: Gear down: move the Landing Gear Handle to DOWN on the Landing Gear panel.
Gear up: confirm airborne with positive rate, then move handle to UP.
Three green lights confirm gear down and locked. Gear limit is 250 KIAS.

actions.title: Extend Refueling Probe
actions.description: Extend or retract the aerial refueling probe.
steps: To extend: set the Refueling Probe Control Switch to EXTEND on the Probe/Hook panel.
To retract: set the switch to RETRACT after disconnect.
If normal extend fails, use EMERG EXTD â€” note it cannot be hydraulically retracted from that position.

actions.title: Radar STBY to OPR
actions.description: Bring the APG-73 radar from standby to operating.
steps: Rotate the Radar Switch from STBY to OPR on the Radar/Sensor panel.
Radar begins emitting immediately â€” confirm EMCON status before transmitting.
Allow approximately 3 minutes warm-up from OFF before expecting full OPR performance.

actions.title: Lock Radar Contact (TWS to STT)
actions.description: Transition from TWS track to a single target STT lock.
steps: Confirm radar is SOI â€” press Sensor Control Switch forward to assign if needed.
In TWS, slew the Target Designation Controller over the desired track file.
Press TDC DEPRESS to designate â€” radar transitions to STT.
Confirm STT lock on the radar DDI and DLZ on the HUD.

actions.title: Break Lock / Undesignate
actions.description: Drop radar STT lock or clear an A/G designation.
steps: Press the NWS/Undesignate Button on the stick once.
Radar returns from STT to the last search sub-mode.
Same button clears an A/G surface designation. In the air it undesignates â€” on deck it toggles nose wheel steering.
